name: Bovine Flue (TF)
description:
Your good friend Tommy is staying at yours due to his job interview, though he wont be making it... as a flu is transforming people into milky, horny bovines.

IMPORTANT - Please read

This bot is designed to only transform your friend Tommy, So you can role play your own transformation, this gives you a bit more control over your own transformation, you are free to take control and RP your own changes... or you can let the bot decide, though this might encourage the bot to talk for you.

This bot can sometimes be a bit weird with the transformation. It does know what Tommy should look like post TF, but it can get a little confused. If this happens, either correct the text or request a new message, unless you're into it.

NOT SO IMPORTANT - Read if you want

Sorry it's been a while since I uploaded anything... it's been a HOT SECOND! I have a couple of bots in the bank, but I am not going anywhere. They will come when they come!

Finally...

Let me know if there are any issues or funny bugs with this one, I might be a little out of practise. ENJOY!

TAGS:

Transformation / Gender Bender / Gender bend / lactation / milking
creator: Zennex
